title: Readymade Garments Factory
description: Establishment of a high-efficiency apparel production plant equipped with modern stitching, cutting, and finishing machinery. Focused on domestic supply chains and export-oriented garment manufacturing.

title: Cold Storage Factory
description: Multi-commodity cold storage facility designed to preserve agricultural perishables, fruits, and vegetables. Features advanced controlled atmosphere and cooling technologies for energy-efficient preservation.

title: Glass Furniture Factory
description: A state-of-the-art manufacturing unit specializing in premium tempered, decorative, and architectural glass furniture for residential and corporate commercial spaces.

title: Wooden Furniture Factory
description: Modern woodworking plant fabricating high-end modular office furniture, doors, home setups, and custom premium wooden interior items utilizing automated carving and finishing tools.

title: Steel Furniture Factory
description: Industrial production line for heavy-duty, durable steel wardrobes, filing systems, institutional furniture, and custom retail displays, using automated sheet metal fabrication.

title: Mini Multi Oil Food Factory
description: Multi-seed oil extraction and refining plant producing premium mustard, groundnut, and sesame oils. Includes integrated modern filtration and automated packaging systems.

title: Cement Block Factory
description: Automated plant producing eco-friendly, high-strength concrete fly-ash bricks, solid blocks, and interlocking pavers to supply rapidly growing local infrastructure markets.

title: Stevia Sugar Production
description: An agro-processing plant focused on extracting and refining natural stevia leaves into zero-calorie organic sweeteners, serving the healthy lifestyle consumer segment.

title: MS Fabrication Factory
description: Mild steel fabrication workshop constructing pre-engineered building components, industrial grates, trusses, and custom steel structures for engineering applications.

title: EV Vehicle Converter Factory
description: Advanced workshop converting conventional internal combustion engine (ICE) two and three-wheelers into eco-friendly electric vehicles, featuring quality-approved conversion kits.

title: Electrical & Electronics Manufacturing
description: Precision assembly facility for premium smart LED lighting products, smart switches, circuit breakers, and consumer-grade home automation components.

title: Cow Milk Ice Cream Factory
description: Dairy processing facility manufacturing premium, organic cow milk ice cream, yogurts, and butter. Features cold chain logistics integration and automated packaging line.

title: EV Call Centre
description: A high-tech digital helpdesk and support facility catering exclusively to EV fleet tracking, battery-swapping support, emergency roadside assistance, and customer queries.

title: Aluminium Furniture Factory
description: Modern lightweight furniture manufacturing unit specializing in rust-proof, fire-resistant aluminium kitchen cabinets, wardrobe shutters, and outdoor furniture solutions.

title: Equipment & Instrument Trading
description: B2B trading hub supplying certified lab equipment, industrial testing instruments, and precision sensors to pharmaceutical, engineering, and educational sectors.

title: 40 Room Hotel Project
description: Premium mid-scale boutique hotel development featuring 40 deluxe rooms, banquet halls, boardrooms, and modern amenities catering to business travelers and tourists.

title: Veg Restaurant
description: Fine-dine pure vegetarian restaurant highlighting global and local cuisines, designed with contemporary aesthetics, fully equipped kitchen, and high-footfall location.

title: Veg & Non-Veg Restaurant
description: Premium multi-cuisine restaurant serving both vegetarian and non-vegetarian menus, complete with distinct family dining sections and state-of-the-art smart kitchen gear.

title: Aquaponic Smart Farming
description: Sustainable agriculture project combining aquaculture (fish farming) with hydroponics (growing plants in water) in a closed-loop recirculating automated smart greenhouse.

title: Papad Manufacturing Cluster
description: High-volume, semi-automated food cluster for traditional and premium spiced papad dough preparation, sheeting, hygienic solar drying, and vacuum packaging.

title: Film Shooting Studio & Editing
description: Modern creative hub offering soundproof indoor shooting floors, premium chroma-key sets, luxury green rooms, and post-production video and audio editing suites.

title: IT App Development Institute
description: State-of-the-art vocational academy offering advanced practical training in mobile app coding, web stacks, machine learning, and UI/UX design concepts.

title: Marketing Software Development
description: Tech lab producing enterprise-level SaaS solutions for marketing automation, customer data platforms, analytics dashboards, and multi-channel drip campaign managers.

title: NBFC Finance Management
description: Professional consulting and fintech branch assisting businesses in NBFC licensing, debt structuring, venture equity facilitation, and structured working capital loans.

title: Mineral Water Plant
description: High-capacity water purification and bottling plant featuring multi-stage reverse osmosis, ozonisation, UV treatment, and automatic PET bottle blowing and sealing.

title: Soft Drink Manufacturing Plant
description: Beverage production unit formulating carbonated drinks, juices, and health mocktails. Outfitted with automatic blending tanks, carbonators, and high-speed canning lines.

title: Mini Township Development
description: Premium industrial housing and commercial layout project offering modern roads, drainage grids, green corridors, and smart utility hubs for corporate workforces.

title: Gold & Silver Ornament Manufacturing
description: Bespoke jewelry manufacturing workshop using laser soldering, 3D printing molds, and automated casting tools to craft high-finish gold and silver ornaments.

title: Fruit & Vegetable Powder Processing
description: Dehydration and spray-drying processing unit converting raw fruits and vegetables into nutrient-rich soluble powders for food, pharma, and cosmetic applications.

title: Egg Farming
description: Modern layer poultry farming project implementing automated feeding, watering, temperature control, and egg grading lines, operating under strict hygienic standards.
